metadata.title: Quick Latex
metadata.description: Speedup latex math typing with auto fraction, custom shorthand, align block shortcut, matrix shortcut...etc

regex.target: text: 'Obsidian 快速 LaTeX - 设置'
.setName('将选中的表达式用数学符号$$括起来')
.setName('自动放大包含 \\sum、\\int 或 \\frac 的括号')
.setName('在上标后自动用{}括起表达式')

regex.source: .setName('Use shift-enter for line break in align and cases block')
regex.target: .setName('在对齐和cases块中使用shift-enter进行换行')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Typing one $ symbol will automatically lose with another $ symbol ' +
            '(best used with "Move cursor between $$ symbols" function')
regex.target:
.setDesc('输入一个 $ 符号会自动与另一个 $ 符号配对' +
            '(最好与 "在 $$ 符号之间移动光标" 功能一起使用')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Enable keyboard shortcuts for inline ($...$) and block ($$...$$) math. ' +
            'Default: ctrl+m (cmd+m on mac) for inline and ctrl+shift+m (cmd+shift+m on mac) for block.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('启用内联（$...$）和块级（$...$）数学公式的键盘快捷键。' +
            '默认: 在行内使用ctrl+m (max: cmd+m)，在块中使用ctrl+shift+m (max: cmd+shift+m) ')

regex.source: .setDesc('Typing two consecutive $ symbols will automatically shift the cursor in between the $$ symbols')
regex.target: .setDesc('连续输入两个$符号将自动将光标移至$$符号之间。')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Select an expression and press "$" key will automatically ' +
            'enclose the expression with the math symbols.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('选择一个表达式并按下“$”键会自动' +
            '将表达式用数学符号括起来.')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Typing "\\sum" will automatically append "\\limits" to shorten the syntax' +
            ' for proper display of the limits for summation symbol.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('输入"\\sum"会自动添加"\\limits"以简化语法。' +
            ' 以正确显示求和符号的界限.')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Typing expression after superscript "^" symbol follow by a "space" key ' +
            'will automatically surround the expression with "{}"')
regex.target:
.setDesc('在上标“^”符号后输入表达式，然后按空格键' +
            '将自动用"{}"包围表达式')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Typing expression after subscript "_" symbol follow by a "space" key ' +
            'will automatically surround the expression with "{}". ' +
            'Note: expression more than 10 characters long will be ignored.')
regex.target:
.setDesc('在下标 "_" 符号后输入表达式，然后按空格键' +
            '将自动用"{}"包围表达式. ' +
            '注意: 超过10个字符的表达式将被忽略')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Use "/" symbol for quickly typing fractions. eg. type "1/2" followed by a "space" key' +
            ' to transform to \\frac{1}{2}')
regex.target:
.setDesc('使用“/”符号快速输入分数。例如，输入“1/2”后按空格键。' +
            '转换为 \\frac{1}{2}')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Use shortcut key to quickly insert \\begin{align*} \\end{align*} block. ' +
            'Default: "Alt+Shift+A" (Mac: "Option+Shift+A")')
regex.target:
.setDesc('使用快捷键快速插入 \\begin{align*} \\end{align*} 块。' +
            '默认: "Alt+Shift+A" (Mac: "Option+Shift+A")')

regex.source: .setDesc('When within the align block, the align symbol "&" will be automatically added before these symbols. (separate by spaces)')
regex.target: .setDesc('在对齐块内，这些符号前会自动添加对齐符号 "&"。（以空格分隔）')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Use shortcut key to quickly insert \\begin{cases} \\end{cases} block. ' +
            'Default: "Alt+Shift+C" (Mac: "Option+Shift+C")')
regex.target:
.setDesc('使用快捷键快速插入 \\begin{cases} \\end{cases} 块。' +
            '默认: "Alt+Shift+C" (Mac: "Option+Shift+C")')

regex.source: .setDesc('For align and cases block above, pressing enter automatically adds line break symbol "\\" or "&". Switch here to use shift-enter instead.')
regex.target: .setDesc('对于上方的对齐和cases块，按回车键会自动添加换行符号"\\"或"&"。切换到此处使用shift-enter代替。')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Use shortcut key to quickly  insert \\begin{pmatrix} \\end{pmatrix} block. ' +
            'Default: "Alt+Shift+M" (Mac: "Option+Shift+M")')
regex.target:
.setDesc('使用快捷键快速插入 \\begin{pmatrix} \\end{pmatrix} 块。' +
            '默认: "Alt+Shift+M" (Mac: "Option+Shift+M")')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Automatically surround commands to insert Greek character written outside math mode with math chars. ' +
            'Eg, typing \\alpha followed by space outside math mode will be replaced with "$\\alpha$"')
regex.target:
.setDesc('自动在数学模式外插入的希腊字符命令周围添加数学字符。' +
            '例如，在数学模式外输入“\\alpha”后跟空格将被替换为“$\alpha$”"')

regex.source:
.setDesc('Use custom shorthand (can be multiple letters) for common latex strings. ' +
            'Eg, typing "al" followed by "space/tab" key will replace with "\\alpha"')
regex.target:
.setDesc('使用自定义缩写（可以是多个字母）来表示常见的LaTeX字符串。' +
            '例如，键入“al”后按“空格/制表符”!键将替换为“\\alpha”')

regex.source: .setDesc('Use Tab instead of space to complete custom shorthand.')
regex.target: .setDesc('使用Tab键而不是空格来完成自定义速记。')
